title: narcissus hedraeanthus
intro: Narcissus hedraeanthus, also known as the striped narcissus, is a flowering plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent, helping to relieve respiratory issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Narcissus hedraeanthus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
